schema.question: User query to send to the RAG chatbot
schema.source_chapter: Source chapter/section in the NSFI document
schema.expected_intent: Intent behind the question (Definition | Explanation | information retrieval)

golden_dataset.question: what does NSFI stand for?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: NSFI stands for national strategy for financial inclusion

golden_dataset.question: which period does NSFI 2025-30 cover
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: it covers the period from 2025-30

golden_dataset.question: who released NSFI 2025-30
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: Reserve Bank of India released NSFI 2025-30

golden_dataset.question: what is the vision of NSFI 2025-30
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: to strengthen and deepen the financial inclusion ecosystem in India

golden_dataset.question: what is the primary objective of financial inclusion
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: to provide affordable and accessible financial services to all sections of society

golden_dataset.question: what are the five strategic objectives of NSFI 2025-30
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: access, usage, quality, and consumer protection

golden_dataset.question: what is financial literacy
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: financial literacy is the ability to understand and effectively use financial skills and services

golden_dataset.question: why is consumer protection important in financial services
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: it protects consumers from unfair practices and promotes trust in the financial system

golden_dataset.question: what is digital financial inclusion
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: digital financial inclusion refers to providing financial services through digital channels

golden_dataset.question: how does financial inclusion support economic growth
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: it promotes inclusive and sustainable economic development

golden_dataset.question: why is access to financial services important
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: access to financial services enables individuals to participate in the formal financial system

golden_dataset.question: why is usage of financial services important
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: usage ensures that financial access translates into meaningful benefits

golden_dataset.question: why is quality important in financial services
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: quality improves customer satisfaction and trust

golden_dataset.question: why is financial literacy important
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: it helps individuals make informed financial decisions

golden_dataset.question: which sections of society are targeted by financial inclusion efforts
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: rural and underserved populations are major focus areas

golden_dataset.question: why is financial awareness important
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: financial awareness promotes responsible use of financial services

golden_dataset.question: why are affordable financial services necessary
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: they ensure wider participation in the financial system

golden_dataset.question: which institution coordinates financial inclusion efforts in India
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: the Reserve Bank of India coordinates financial inclusion efforts

golden_dataset.question: what is the significance of financial inclusion for economic growth
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: financial inclusion promotes inclusive and sustainable economic growth

golden_dataset.question: why is consumer trust important in financial services
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: consumer trust encourages greater participation in the financial system
